notes: Published numbers are reference points from original papers on related but not identical splits/preprocessing. They are not reproduced by this repository.

references.citation: GNN-IDS: Graph Neural Networks for Intrusion Detection Systems (ARES 2024)
references.metric_source: Paper reports strong performance on synthetic/public IDS-derived attack graphs; no single canonical CIC-IDS2017 AUC row.

references.citation: Self-Supervised Learning of Graph Representations for Network Intrusion Detection (NeurIPS 2025)
Anomal-E: A Self-Supervised Network Intrusion Detection System based on Graph Neural Networks (2022)
references.metric_source: Paper reports improved detection using learned embeddings vs raw features on NF-UNSW-NB15 and NF-BoT-IoT; no unified CIC-IDS2017 AUC.
